content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian had a general understanding of the situation of copying talents.

After the transformation, the scope of the copying talent and other aspects have been improved a lot, and it has been upgraded by a notch on the original basis.

But the real change is that the copy talent has one more ability than before-

Hyper-Replication Fusion!

The ability to fuse talents, Ye Tian's copying talent itself has it, but it is not very powerful, and it can only fuse two similar arcane talents into a god-level talent.

For example, the original god-level speed talent was fused from the arcane-level speed talent and the arcane-level flying talent, and talent fusion is also one of the ways to achieve many god-level talents.

In addition, the Five Elements Transformation Talent is also a fusion of the five Five Elements Arcane-level talents.

But the ability to fuse is roughly like this, after reaching the god level, the talent can't continue to fuse.

Ye Tian originally thought that there was no way to fuse god-level talents, because other people's god-level talents could not be fused.

But now, the replication talent has transformed, and the resulting super-replication fusion ability has broken this limitation.

It can fuse multiple god-level talents to produce more powerful talents.

Of course.

It will take time!

The more talents you fuse, the longer it will take, and the longer it will take if you fuse powerful talents.

"Turn on the hyper-replication and fusion capability!"

"Try to fuse the god-level Five Elements Transformation Talent, God-level Time Talent, God-level Space Talent, and God-level Wind Blade Talent ......"

Ye Tian was suddenly ready to try to fuse twelve god-level basic attribute talents, and wanted to know how long it would take to fuse so many talents.

Soon, the copy talent was given a specific time.

"10 billion years!"

Looking at it for such a long time, Ye Tian was stunned.

Although he is sure that he will live for so long, it will be too long.

He couldn't wait for such a long time.

"Try to fuse the god-level time talent and the god-level space talent!"

Ye Tian continued to turn on the super replication fusion ability.

This time, the copy talent gives a fusion time.

"10,000 years!"

It's only 10,000 years, which is not very long for Ye Tian.

Today, his lifespan is almost infinite, and as long as the universe does not collapse, he will hardly die from lifespan.

Therefore, just 10,000 years is nothing to him, and even for other True God Levels, 10,000 years is not too long.

What's more, Ye Tian used the effect of time acceleration to spend 10,000 years faster.

However, when it comes to fusing the time talent and the space talent, these two talents are almost unusable, which is also one of the shortcomings of the super-replication fusion ability.

"Although I can't use the time acceleration ability when I fuse the time talent and the space talent, I have a half-finished time origin artifact, and I can use that semi-finished time origin artifact to create a time acceleration area and form a time formation, with the power of the semi-finished time origin artifact, maintain a 300-fold acceleration time, last for 10,000 years, and it can't consume too much energy. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thinking of this, he did so.

Immediately, he took out the half-finished Time Origin Artifact Crystal, urged a little bit of the power in it, and combined it with the power of the formation, to build a time formation area.

Buzz Buzz!!

The power of time rippled, and the passage of time in this area became faster and faster, gradually reaching 300 times that of the outside world.

"Let's start cultivating here in the next time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Anyway, he has just returned from the small world of chaos now, and there are still a lot of things to cultivate.

For example, the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, as well as the silver liquid substance that can increase the strength of the physical body that I obtained before, can also be taken and used to improve my strength.

"The Chaos Golden Desolation Technique records the secret of the Transcendent, and it can expand the limit of my physical body, it can definitely greatly increase my strength, and if it is added to that silver liquid substance, it can definitely make my physical body reach an incredible level!"

Ye Tiandao.

So, Ye Tian began to browse the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to finish the preliminary browsing of this golden book.

"The secret of the transcendent is to take the path of rebellion, and after becoming the supreme level, he will use his own powerful power to communicate with the long river of time and space, extract his soul imprint from the long river of time and space, and fuse his body, so as to truly transcend the universe. If you don't take the road against the sky, your bond with the universe will become deeper and deeper, and in the depths of the long river of time and space, it will be deeper and deeper, and it will be countless times more difficult to get out of the long river of time and space. Therefore, if you want to be detached from the universe and become a detached person, you must take the path of defying the sky, otherwise it is almost impossible to achieve it. "

Seeing this, Ye Tian was very glad that he had chosen to take the path of rebellion, otherwise even if his talent reached the supreme level, he would not be able to surpass the supreme level.

The Origin of the Universe will always suppress him, so that he cannot transcend.

Of course, the origin of the universe does this, but also out of protection measures for itself, if it is not suppressed, almost all the creatures in the universe can be transcended, and when the time comes, a bunch of detached people will appear, constantly suppressing the resources of the universe, and even seeking the origin of the universe, which will directly lead to the complete death of a universe.

Knowing the secret of the transcendent, Ye Tian's heart settled down slightly.

Immediately, he began to cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

The Chaos Golden Desolation Technique seems to be an upgraded version of the Chaos Body Refining Technique, except that the Chaos Body Refining Technique can no longer be cultivated after the god level, while the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique is suitable for God level and above.

With the realm of the Chaos Yuan Supreme, it can only create such a supreme divine canon as the Chaos Refining Technique, which shows how profound the realm needs to be to create the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

This made Ye Tian even more curious about the master of the Golden Desolation Palace, it was definitely a supreme existence far beyond the supreme level.

There are a total of eight realms in the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, the first layer can expand the physical strength of the god level, and the second layer can expand the physical strength of the true god level.

However, the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique was extremely difficult to cultivate and required a lot of time.

"Lots of time, let's try the effect!"

Ye Tian began to cultivate the first layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, and in the blink of an eye, he had been cultivating for a few years.

However, Ye Tian's physical strength increased very insignificantly.

This is only the first layer, corresponding to the god-level realm, if you cultivate the second layer, the speed will definitely be even slower.

But.

The Chaos Golden Desolation Recipe is also marked on it, and some Chaos resources can be used to assist in cultivation.

As a result, Ye Tian used various chaos resources to assist in cultivation next, and his progress speed really accelerated.

But in the end, Ye Tian was shocked to find that there was an auxiliary treasure with the best effect, far surpassing other resources.

This treasure is that silvery liquid substance!

If the effect of cultivating the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique alone is 1, and the effect of taking the Silver Liquid Substance alone is 3, then the effect of using the Silver Liquid Substance to cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolation Recipe is 10, or even 20.

"Next, I will use the silver liquid substance to assist in cultivating the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, which can definitely expand the limit of my physical strength again!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
